8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.vis-jsontemplate/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-widgets/package.json, /widgets/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"
